items.title: One of the biggest QOL improvements for me with Claude Code/Cowork has been the askUserQuestion tool
items.raw_summary:
One of the biggest QOL improvements for me with Claude Code/Cowork has been the askUserQuestion tool.

I love when Claude asks follow up questions to really hone in on what I'm trying to accomplish and it actually helps me a ton provide clarity and understand what I even want.
items.why_it_matters: One of the biggest QOL improvements for me with Claude Code/Cowork has been the askUserQuestion tool

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 23 - Fine-Grained Tool Streaming
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 23 - Fine-Grained Tool Streaming

Streaming text often feels instant. Tool calls don't.

That's because tool parameters buffer until the JSON validates before they stream to you.

"eager_input_streaming: true" removes that wait.

items.title: We’re releasing TranslateGemma, a new family of open translation models with support for 55 language
items.raw_summary:

Available in 4B, 12B, and 27B parameter sizes – they’re designed for efficiency without sacrificing quality. https://t.co/SRJzCOAKyG

items.title: New research: The AI Fluency Index.
items.raw_summary:
New research: The AI Fluency Index.

We tracked 11 behaviors across thousands of https://t.co/RxKnLNNcNR conversations—for example, how often people iterate and refine their work with Claude—to measure how well people collaborate with AI.

Read more: https://t.co/g65nGQFmjG

items.title: We’ve identified industrial-scale distillation attacks on our models by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and M
items.raw_summary:
We’ve identified industrial-scale distillation attacks on our models by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax.

These labs created over 24,000 fraudulent accounts and generated over 16 million exchanges with Claude, extracting its capabilities to train and improve their own models.
items.why_it_matters: We’ve identified industrial-scale distillation attacks on our models by DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and M

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 22 - Web Fetch
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 22 - Web Fetch

Web Search (Day 8) returns snippets.

Web Fetch returns the whole page.

Pass a URL. Claude reads the full content like articles, docs, PDFs. No scraping infra needed.

Tip: Combine Search and Fetch! No extra charge. Just token costs

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 21 - Text Editor Tool
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 21 - Text Editor Tool

Give Claude a scalpel, not a sledgehammer

The Text Editor Tool lets Claude view files, find exactly what needs changing, & replace it with surgical precision

view → str_replace → done

No full rewrites or hallucinated diffs

items.title: 🎨 Generating or editing images at scale?
items.raw_summary:
🎨 Generating or editing images at scale?

Batch API now supports GPT Image models: gpt-image-1.5, chatgpt-image-latest, gpt-image-1, gpt-image-1-mini.

Submit up to 50,000 generations or edits as async jobs at 50% lower cost with separate rate limits.
